category_sources: Official Tor Snowflake site describes using Snowflake to unblock Tor where Tor is blocked.
source_facts.description says it is a pluggable transport using WebRTC inspired by Flashproxy.
display_name_sources: Official Tor Snowflake site and Tor Project GitLab project use the name Snowflake.
docs_sources: Official Tor Project GitLab wiki and README are project documentation surfaces.
Official Tor Snowflake site provides usage and proxy guidance.
repo_sources: Official Tor Project GitLab project is the source-control home for Snowflake.
tags_sources: Official Tor Snowflake site describes Tor unblocking, volunteer proxies, and command-line proxy guidance.
source_facts.description identifies WebRTC and pluggable transport functionality.
